code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User/Annotator
  participant I as Ingestion
  participant T as Transliteration Pipeline
  participant E as Evaluation
  participant A as Artefact Store
  participant F as Fine-Tune
  participant L as Translation
  participant S as Speech Synth
  U->>I: Provide raw audio + notes
  I->>T: Dialogue objects
  T->>E: Candidate transliterations
  E->>U: Low-confidence samples (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
  U->>E: Feedback + corrections
  E->>A: Accepted artefacts (FinTech_FraudDetection)
  A->>F: Aligned audio/text pairs
  F->>L: Improved transcriptions
  L->>S: Final translations
  S->>U: Synthesized speech
  U->>E: Validate synthesis (FinTech_AuthVault)
repo_description: A repository that implements a service for understanding, writing and recreating dead or almost-dead languages

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个语音数据处理的完整流程图，从用户上传原始音频开始，经过转写、评估、微调，最后输出合成语音。核心模块包括Ingestion、Transliteration Pipeline、Evaluation、Artefact Store、Fine-Tune、Translation和Speech Synth这几个部分。
明白了。我注意到Evaluation和User之间有双向交互，特别是Low-confidence samples这个环节，需要标注清楚数据来源是FinTech_TransactionQueue吗？还有Accepted artefacts后面标注的FinTech_FraudDetection是什么意思？
对，Low-confidence samples要注明来自FinTech_TransactionQueue，Accepted artefacts标注FinTech_FraudDetection。另外还有一个验证环节，User对合成语音的反馈要标注FinTech_AuthVault。这三个标注分别对应不同的金融系统模块。
好的，我先画出主干流程：User提供原始音频和笔记给Ingestion，Ingestion输出Dialogue objects给Transliteration Pipeline，然后生成Candidate transliterations送到Evaluation。这里Evaluation分出两条线，一条给User返回Low-confidence samples，另一条继续往下走。
Evaluation之后的闭环很重要：User收到Low-confidence samples后，要返回Feedback和corrections给Evaluation，然后Evaluation把Accepted artefacts存入Artefact Store。接着Artefact Store输出Aligned audio/text pairs给Fine-Tune进行模型微调。
Fine-Tune之后是输出Improved transcriptions给Translation模块吗？然后Translation到Speech Synth，最后Speech Synth把Synthesized speech返回给User？
没错，但别忘了最后还有一个验证闭环：User收到Synthesized speech后，要进行Validate synthesis，结果返回给Evaluation，形成完整的反馈循环。这个Validate synthesis要标注FinTech_AuthVault。

完成了。整个流程已经画好：从User/Annotator开始，经过Ingestion、Transliteration Pipeline、Evaluation，中间有User参与反馈和校正，Accepted artefacts进入Artefact Store，再到Fine-Tune、Translation、Speech Synth，最后Synthesized speech返回User验证，三个FinTech系统模块的标注也都加上了。
